blurb_en: Midjourney shipped V8.1 on April 30, making HD mode — native 2K images — the default for all generations instead of a separate upscale step. Standard renders are now 4–5x faster than earlier versions, HD is 3x faster and 3x cheaper than V8.0, and the prompt engine is noticeably better at holding small detail across complex compositions. If you’ve been using Midjourney for storyboarding, concept art, or campaign visuals, the speed change alone rewrites the workflow math: a mood board that used to take an afternoon now takes a lunch break. Style references (srefs) are also more consistent across frames — which matters more than resolution for anyone running AI images in production.
blurb_zh: Midjourney于4月30日发布V8.1，将高清模式（原生2K分辨率）设为所有生成的默认选项，无需再单独执行放大步骤。标准渲染速度比此前版本加4到5倍，高清模式速度掄3倍、费用降低3倍，提示词理解也明显更准确，能更好地保留复杂构图中的细节。对于用AI生成概念图、故事板或视觉素材的创作者来说，这次速度提升直接改变了工作流程的效率——以前要花半天的情绪板，现在午饥时间就能搞定。
verification_notes: Release date April 30 2026 confirmed by felloai.com review, pixverse.ai roundup, releasebot.io, and YouTube tutorial dated April 2026. Features confirmed consistent across all sources.

blurb_en: An open-source tool called ex.skill is spreading in China, letting users feed a former partner’s chat logs, photos, and social posts into a neural network that then responds the way that person used to. The module started as a workplace tool designed to replicate a colleague’s expertise, before pivoting to romantic nostalgia. Users report either genuine closure or an accelerating dependency — with little in between. The subject of the recreation has zero input in the process, since ex.skill requires no consent from the person being digitally resurrected, which is somehow not the most alarming aspect of this story.
blurb_zh: 中国爆火的开源工具ex.skill，允许用户将前任的聊天记录、照片和社交媒体帖子喟给神经网络，生成一个会以相似语气回应的“AI前任”。这个模块最初是为复制同事工作风格而开发的，结果自然而然地转向了感情领域。用户反馈两极分化：有人因此获得了真正的释然，有人却加剧了依恋。而被数字重建的那个人对此毫不知情——该工具不需要任何本人同意，这竞然不是整件事最令人担忧的地方。
verification_notes: Story confirmed by SCMP, Asia Business Daily (May 4 2026), Oddity Central, Dexerto, and pudgycat.io across multiple independent sources. Open-source origin via AI engineer Zhou Tianyi confirmed across sources.

blurb_en: Apple Music VP Oliver Schusser confirmed that over a third of all new uploads to the platform are now fully AI-generated — no human musician involved. The catch: AI tracks account for less than 0.5% of total listening time, meaning the AI flood is enormous and almost entirely unheard. Apple introduced optional Transparency Tags in March 2026 letting labels flag AI involvement, but participation is voluntary and few are rushing to label their output as machine-made. For anyone tracking where content creation is heading: AI can now produce in unlimited volume, and audiences still reach for the same small pile of human-made things.
blurb_zh: Apple Music副总裁Oliver Schusser证实，平台上超过三分之一的新音乐上传作品完全由AI生成，没有任何真人音乐人参与。但矛盾之处在于：AI歌曲占总播放时长不到0.5%——AI洪流体量巨大，却几乎无人聆听。Apple于今年3月推出了自愿参与的“透明度标签”，允许唱片公司标注AI参与程度，但很少有人急着给自己的作品贴上“机器制造”的标签。
verification_notes: 33% AI uploads stat confirmed by TechRadar, TechBriefly (April 28 2026), Dataconomy, and Chartlex all citing VP Oliver Schusser. Transparency Tags confirmed by DigitalMusicNews and MusicBusinessWorldwide from March 2026. 0.5% listening stat confirmed across multiple sources.

blurb_en: Spotify launched a beta CLI tool on May 7 that lets AI agents — built with Claude, OpenAI’s Codex, or OpenClaw — generate personalized podcasts and save them directly to your Spotify library. The premise: you describe what you want, and the agent produces an audio episode — a deep dive on the World Cup, a briefing on your Tuesday calendar, whatever you need before the 9am. The feature is available globally to free and premium subscribers during the beta. Nobody asked for more content options, but someone at Spotify noticed that AI-generated audio still sounds like a podcast even when the subject is your morning meetings.
blurb_zh: Spotify于5月7日推出测试版CLI工具，让基于Claude、OpenAI Codex或OpenClaw搭建的AI助手能够生成个性化播客，并直接保存至用户的Spotify资料库。逻辑很简单：你描述想听什么——“世界杯历史深度解析”或“我今天日历的早间简报”——助手就生成一集音频。该功能面向全球免费和付费用户开放，测试期间有使用量限制。
verification_notes: May 7 2026 launch confirmed independently by TechCrunch, MacRumors, 9to5Google, Engadget, and rollingout.com. Feature details consistent across all five sources.

blurb_en: Donald Trump arrived in Beijing on May 14 for a summit with Xi Jinping, with AI safety formally on the agenda — and Nvidia CEO Jensen Huang quietly added to the American delegation. U.S. Treasury Secretary Scott Bessent told CNBC that the U.S. retains roughly an eight-month lead over China in frontier model capability and can negotiate from that position. Analysts say a sweeping agreement is unlikely, but both sides appear interested in a floor: preventing AI-driven incidents from escalating into broader economic or cybersecurity conflict. For any hardware or camera company exporting between the two countries, the outcome of this meeting has direct implications for which chips end up in which products over the next few years.
blurb_zh: 特朗普于5月14日抖达北京，与习近平举行峰会，AI安全首次正式列入议程——英伝CEO黄仁勋也情势加入美国代表团。美国财政部长贝森告诉CNBC，美国在前沿模型能力上仍领先中国约8个月，具备充分谈判筹码。分析人士认为全面协议的可能性不大，但双方都有意建立某种底线：防止AI相关事件升级为更大范围的经济或网络安全冲突。对于在中美两国间进行硬件出口的企业而言，这次峰会的结果直接影响未来几年哪些芯片能进入哪些产品。
verification_notes: Summit confirmed by CNBC (May 14), Japan Times (May 14), Bloomberg (May 13 preview), Euronews (May 13). Jensen Huang addition confirmed by multiple outlets. Bessent CNBC quote confirmed. Eight-month lead figure from analyst consensus cited across multiple sources.

blurb_en: At Baidu’s Create 2026 developer conference in Beijing, CEO Robin Li proposed ‘Daily Active Agents’ (DAA) as the AI industry’s new core metric — the equivalent of Daily Active Users for the mobile era, except you’re counting the bots instead of the people. Baidu released ERNIE 5.1, which placed first among Chinese models on LMArena’s text and search leaderboards, alongside a general-purpose agent called DuMate that can read screens, operate software, and connect to business systems. Li’s framing — moving from model competition to agent competition — is now the standard pitch from every major Chinese AI company, each attached to slightly different products. The more interesting signal is the bet that users will eventually care more about what their AI does than which model it runs on.
blurb_zh: 在45月14日于北京举行的百度Create 2026开发者大会上，CEO李彦宏提出将“每日活跃智能体”（DAA）作为AI行业的核心指标——相当于移动互联网时代日活用户数的智能体版本，只不过统计对象从人变成了机器人。百度同步发布了文心5.1，在LMArena文本和搜索排行榜上位居中国模型首位，并推出了可以读屏、操作软件、接入业务系统的通用型智能体DuMate。李彦宏的判断——“竞争已从模型转向智能体”——如今是中国所有主要AI公司的标准话术，配套产品各有不同。
verification_notes: Confirmed by TechNode (May 14), Caixin Global (May 14), PRNewswire press release (May 14), investing.com, and StockTitan. DAA metric, ERNIE 5.1 launch, and DuMate agent all corroborated across sources.

blurb_en: At least 40 AI-generated videos have been circulating on Douyin and WeChat since early May, each showing a different person delivering the identical script — accusing Singapore of being ungrateful and disrespectful to China. Digital experts confirmed the videos are AI-generated, citing synthetic appearances and word-for-word duplication of content across clips. Singapore’s government said it is monitoring the situation, noting the videos circulate mostly on platforms not widely used by Singaporeans — which is either a reassuring fact or a failure to grasp the point. The campaign is a practical demonstration of AI video at scale: low cost, high volume, each clip looking superficially unique.
blurb_zh: 至5月初，至少40段AI生成视频开始在抖音和微信上广泛传播，每段视频均由不同面孔念着同一份剧本——指责新加坡对中国“忘恩负义”、“不知感恩”。数字取证专家证实这些是AI生成内容，依据包括合成人像特征和多段视频逐字重复的内容。新加坡政府表示正在关注局势，并指出这些视频主要在新加坡人不常用的平台上流传——这要么是一个令人放心的事实，要么是完全没抓住重点。这场运动展示了AI视频规模化部署的实际效果：成本低、数量大，每段看上去都不一样。
verification_notes: Published May 12 2026 per SCMP. Independently confirmed by theindependent.sg and startupfortune.com. 40+ clips, Douyin/WeChat platforms, and Singapore government response all corroborated across sources. Direct article fetch returned 403 but content confirmed via three cross-references.
